items.raw_excerpt: Built to house hydroelectric workers in the 1960s, Fusions Australia acquired Poatina, population 100, in 1995…
items.summary_en: A charity is selling Poatina, a remote Tasmanian Midlands village built in the 1960s to house hydroelectric workers. The village has about 100 residents and was acquired by Fusions Australia in 1995.
items.title_en: Charity Selling Remote Village in Tasmania's Midlands
items.title_original: Charity Selling Remote Village in Tasmania’s Midlands - The Urban Developer

items.raw_excerpt: After twenty-five years of anticipation, Norway’s first dedicated cycling motorway, the Sykkelstamveien, officially opened on Tuesday, June 16th.
items.summary_en: Norway has officially opened its first dedicated cycling motorway, the Sykkelstamveien. The route opened on Tuesday, June 16, after twenty-five years of anticipation.

items.raw_excerpt: Some football expressions are useful long after the match is over. One of the best examples is am Ball bleiben.
items.summary_en: The Local Austria highlights the German expression "am Ball bleiben," noting that some football phrases stay useful long after a match ends. It is a light language and culture item rather than major news.

items.raw_excerpt: Germany is home to countless beautiful villages. Here are eight of The Local's recommendations for some of the most charming ones to visit this summer for a day trip or as part of a longer tour.

items.raw_excerpt: El municipio valenciano de Canet d’en Berenguer ha preparado una programación para celebrar las fiestas de San Juan con una propuesta que combinará música en directo, gastronomía, espect...
items.summary_en: Canet d’en Berenguer, a municipality in Valencia, has prepared a San Juan festival program without the traditional bonfires. The town is replacing them with alternatives such as live music, gastronomy, shows, and a zombie night to reduce vandalism risks.
items.title_en: Valencian town replaces San Juan bonfires with new events to prevent vandalism
items.title_original: Un pueblo de Valencia dice 'no' a las hogueras de San Juan para evitar el vandalismo y las sustituye por novedades como una noche zombi - elperiodic.com

items.raw_excerpt: When Swedes talk about celebrating midsommar, they mean Midsummer's Eve, which this year falls on Friday June 19th. It's not a so-called 'red day', but do you still get the day off?
items.summary_en: The article explains whether people in Sweden normally get time off for Midsummer's Eve. Although it is not an official red day, the question matters because many Swedes treat Midsummer as one of the country's major seasonal celebrations.
items.title_en: Do workers in Sweden get Midsummer's Eve off?
items.title_original: Do I get a day off in Sweden at Midsummer?

items.raw_excerpt: Austria’s biggest free outdoor sports initiative returns, with more than 700 classes taking place in parks, public squares and open spaces across the country.
items.summary_en: Austria’s largest free outdoor sports initiative is returning for the summer. More than 700 classes will be held in parks, public squares, and open spaces across the country.
items.title_en: How to Join Free Outdoor Fitness Classes in Austria This Summer

items.raw_excerpt: A large school of fish swarms near the surface of the water beneath an angler's fishing line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City, Wakayama Prefecture. The coastal waters surrounding the port are known for a rich marine ecosystem that supports both local recreational angling and a thriving commercial fisheries industry,…
items.summary_en: A large school of fish gathered near the surface below an angler's line at Saikazaki harbor in Wakayama City. The scene highlights the rich coastal waters around the port, where recreational fishing and commercial fisheries both thrive.

items.raw_excerpt: This Swedish village is located by the largest inland lake in the country and offers stunning views, nature retreats, lovely cafes, a blues festival, and more.
items.summary_en: A travel feature spotlights Åmål, a Swedish lakeside village between Stockholm and Oslo, for its views over the country’s largest inland lake. The village is described as offering nature retreats, art, shops, cute cafes, and a blues festival.
items.title_en: Åmål, Sweden Highlighted as a Lakeside Village for Art, Cafes, and Nature
items.title_original: Situated Between Stockholm And Oslo Is Sweden's Lakeside Village Brimming With Art, Shops, And Cute Cafes - islands.com

items.raw_excerpt: Mehr als ein Drittel der 100 Einwohner des schottischen Ortes „Dull“ haben die Einladung angenommen, Ende Jänner 2026 nach Wien zu kommen.
items.summary_en: Vienna's tourism board invited the whole Scottish village of Dull to visit the city. More than a third of the village's roughly 100 residents accepted the invitation to come at the end of January 2026.
items.title_en: Is Vienna Dull? Tourism Board Invites an Entire Scottish Village
items.title_original: „Is Vienna Dull?“: Tourismusverband lädt ganzes schottisches Dorf ein - DiePresse.com

items.raw_excerpt: Not sure where to catch Argentina's matches? From Palermo pubs to traditional pizza joints, here's where porteños will be gathering for football's biggest tournament.
items.summary_en: Buenos Aires Herald shares a local guide to places in Buenos Aires where residents will gather to watch Argentina's World Cup matches. The piece highlights venues ranging from Palermo pubs to traditional pizza spots, focusing on the city's everyday football-watching culture.

items.raw_excerpt: SANTA FIORA – Il grande ciclismo giovanile mondiale fa tappa sulle strade della Toscana. Il 22 e 23 maggio 2026 si terrà la Tuscany Cycling Academy
items.summary_en: The Tuscany Cycling Academy Juniors will bring international youth cycling to the roads of Tuscany. The event is scheduled for May 22 and 23, 2026, around Santa Fiora and Monte Amiata.
